title: Allow use the async api without instantiate a client
body:
Hi!

Would be more intuitive and more symmetric if the asynchronous api were accessible without instantiating the client. 

e.g


```Python
import aiohttpx from httpx
r = await aiohttpx.get('https://www.example.com/')
```

Thank you for this wonderful project.
author: dsvictor94

comments.author: tomchristie
comments.body: Thanks! I don’t think that’s something we’re likely to do. async is useful specifically for making highly concurrent number of requests, in which case you always want to be using a Clients connection pool. (If anything I’d prefer dropping the top level API entirely and always requiring a client instance)
